description_long: This is a light-duty pickup truck with a single cab and a spacious open cargo bed at the rear. The body is painted in a pale, almost white color, with black trim around the windows, bumpers, and wheel arches. The truck features two side mirrors, simple steel wheels, and a utilitarian design with minimal ornamentation. The front end has rectangular headlights and a black grille, while the rear displays the model name in bold lettering on the tailgate. The windows are tinted dark, and the overall styling suggests a practical, work-oriented vehicle. The truck appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with glass windows and rubber tires.
description: A pale-colored, single-cab pickup truck with a large open cargo bed, black trim, and utilitarian styling. It features steel wheels, tinted windows, and bold model lettering on the tailgate.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the single cab, black grille, rectangular headlights, and side mirror details.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the open cargo bed, tailgate with model lettering, and rear bumper.
description_view_2: Rear side view focusing on the cargo bed, tailgate, and the alignment of the wheels.
description_view_3: Front side view emphasizing the cab, side mirror, and the transition from the cab to the cargo bed.
